title: FWDeathSwap2
description: A simple Death Swap mini-game plugin
body:
# FWDeathSwap

In this game, players (at least 2) swap when the time is up.

Try to trap each other! The last survivor wins.

## Commands

- `/fwds start`
- `/fwds stop`
- `/fwds players add <players>` - Add `players` to **the upcoming game**
- `/fwds players remove <players>` - Remove `players` from **the upcoming game**
- `/fwds players clear` - Clear the player list of **the upcoming game**
- `/fwds query upcoming`
- `/fwds query ongoing`
- `/fwds query` - Depend on whether the game is running
